entities.name: AMHARA REGION
entities.description: A region in Ethiopia where grain and soil were sampled for selenium analysis.

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted.

entities.name: TEFF
entities.description: Eragrostis tef, a grain analyzed for selenium concentration.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Triticum aestivum, a grain analyzed for selenium concentration.

entities.name: SELENIUM CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of selenium (Se) measured in grain and soil.

entities.name: SELENIUM DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency observed in the population of the Amhara Region.

entities.name: PREDICTIVE MODELS
entities.description: Models developed to predict the concentration of selenium in grains.

entities.name: MULTIVARIATE LINEAR MIXED MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to represent predicted and observed selenium concentrations.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSOR OBSERVATIONS
entities.description: Data used as fixed effects covariates in the multivariate linear mixed model.

entities.name: DIGITAL ELEVATION MODEL
entities.description: Data used as fixed effects covariates in the multivariate linear mixed model.

entities.name: FALSE DISCOVERY RATE CONTROL
entities.description: A statistical procedure used to select predictors and avoid over-fitting.

entities.name: ALPHA-INVESTMENT PROCEDURE
entities.description: A procedure used to maximize statistical power to detect significant relationships.

entities.name: CROSS-VALIDATION
entities.description: A method used to characterize uncertainties in empirical best linear unbiased predictions.

entities.name: EMPIRICAL BEST LINEAR UNBIASED PREDICTIONS
entities.description: A method for predicting selenium concentration in grains.

entities.name: MAPPING
entities.description: The process of displaying spatial predictions of selenium concentration.
